title: SG Totem
description: A simple mod to allow totems of undying direclty from every slot of the inventory.
body: ![Totems from the inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53485fc51e3f7ae54bb81fe11a35e78dfcffd9b0_0.webp)A simple mod to allow totems of undying to be triggered direclty from every slot of the inventory. Now you can use the secondary hand for the shield or something else.
